feed.title: Shruthi's Lab Updates (Atom)
feed.subtitle: Atom feed for Shruthi Anandraman's Intro to ITWS labs

entry.title: Lab 01 - Personal Setup
entry.summary: Creating and establishing all the softwares and resources needed for the labs and assignments of the Intro to ITWS Class.

entry.title: Lab 02 - Resume
entry.summary: Developed a resume describing Shruthi's academic achievements, projects, skills and work experiences.

entry.title: Lab 03 - Personal Website and Information Architecture
entry.summary: Develop a Personal Website to highlight all the semester/personal projects and design a Information Architecture for it's layout.

entry.title: Lab 03b - Personal Website Enhancements
entry.summary: Enhance the project Lab03 using Artificial Intelligence.

entry.title: Lab 04 - RSS and Atom Feed Implementation
entry.summary: Built and validated an RSS feed in XML format to publish updates from my ITWS labs.
